header: Meet Forest — calm, deep, and ready to ship
subheadline: One of 15 presets alongside Aurora, Marine, Ember, and Midnight: deep greens, WCAG 2.2-checked contrast, and a full light and dark palette applied to every element the second you select it. This is what it renders.

background_image.title: River landscape
background_image.alternative: A calm river winding through a green landscape.
